sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Allison Transmission Holdings Set to Join S&P MidCap 400 and Goodyear Tire & Rubber to Join S&P SmallCap 600
feed.summary: Allison Transmission Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ALSN) is set to replace Goodyear Tire & Rubber Co. (NASD: GT) in the S&P MidCap 400. Concurrently, Goodyear Tire & Rubber will join the S&P SmallCap 600, replacing Stellar Bancorp Inc. (NYSE: STEL), following Prosperity Bancshares Inc.'s (NYSE: PB) acquisition of Stellar Bancorp. These changes will become effective prior to the opening of trading on Monday, July 6, 2026.

feed.title: Benjamin Silbermann lists multiple Class A share sales for Pinterest (NYSE: PINS)
feed.summary: Pinterest (NYSE: PINS) affiliate Benjamin Silbermann has filed a Form 144, indicating proposed sales of Class A Common Stock across multiple dates in May and June 2026. The filing details various lots, including 8,414 shares on May 21, 2026, and several entries of 46,875 shares in June 2026, with corresponding dollar amounts. This routine disclosure is a notice of intended resale by an affiliate and does not necessarily equate to completed sales or impact the company's outstanding share count directly.

feed.title: N.J. castle hotel built with over 1 million bricks just got prestigious new name
feed.summary: A castle-inspired hotel in Parsippany, New Jersey, originally built in 1987 with over a million bricks, has been rebranded from a Sheraton to a Dolce by Wyndham Parsippany. The hotel, known for its unique design and large facilities, is now part of Wyndham's upscale Dolce Hotels and Resorts brand, a significant change noted by its original builder.

feed.title: Should You Buy Wix.com Ltd. (WIX)’s Shares?
feed.summary: Wix.com Ltd. (NASDAQ:WIX) has seen a significant drop in its share price, down 71% over the past year and 55% year-to-date, despite efforts to integrate AI into its platforms. The company recently partnered with OpenAI for its Codex Enterprise platform and Microsoft for its 365 Copilot, aiming to enhance user experience within these ecosystems. While acknowledging the risks, the article suggests that other AI stocks might offer greater return potential.

feed.title: Zumiez CFO Christopher Work announces resignation after 19 years
feed.summary: Zumiez Inc. announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Christopher C. Work, plans to resign after 19 years with the company. Work will continue in his role during the transition period while Zumiez searches for a successor with the help of an executive search firm. No specific timeline for the new CFO's appointment has been provided.

feed.title: Enterprise value to revenue forward of Allarity Therapeutics, Inc. – NASDAQ:ALLR
feed.summary: This article focuses on the enterprise value to revenue forward metric for Allarity Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALLR). It appears to be a financial data point presented on TradingView, serving as part of the company's financial overview. The content primarily consists of navigation, disclaimers, and acknowledgments of data providers related to the TradingView platform itself.

feed.title: KTOS (NASDAQ: KTOS) Form 144 lists 4,675 shares; insider 10b5-1 sales recorded
feed.summary: A Form 144 filing for Kratos Defense & Security Solutions (NASDAQ: KTOS) indicates a proposed sale of 4,675 shares of Common Stock, categorized as Performance Stock Units. The filing also discloses two prior 10b5-1 insider sales by Stacey Rock, totaling 4,000 shares on April 28, 2026, for $244,100.00, and another 4,000 shares on May 28, 2026, for $261,872.00. This filing provides transparency regarding planned share dispositions and past insider transactions under a 10b5-1 plan.

feed.title: TE Connectivity (TEL) Gets Downgraded by Evercore ISI – Here’s Why
feed.summary: Evercore ISI downgraded TE Connectivity (NYSE:TEL) to "In Line" from "Outperform," lowering the price target to $230 from $260. The firm cited that the stock's current valuation already reflects its long-term potential, despite structural growth drivers from AI and energy. Evercore ISI noted a less favorable 12-month risk/reward outlook, as AI currently constitutes a small portion of TE Connectivity's revenue.

feed.title: Aerospace Opportunities Affirm PPG Industries, Inc. (PPG) as One of the Best Dividend Aristocrat Stocks to Buy
feed.summary: PPG Industries, Inc. (NYSE: PPG) is identified as a top dividend aristocrat stock, with BMO Capital analyst John McNulty reiterating an Outperform rating and raising the price target to $140. The company's growth potential is highlighted by its strategic focus on the aerospace sector, including commercial and military opportunities, through innovation and capacity expansion. PPG Industries is a global manufacturer of paints, coatings, and specialty materials across various industries.

feed.title: Medtronic plc (MDT) & Retia Expand Partnership to Target High-Risk Surgical and Critically ill Patients
feed.summary: Medtronic plc (MDT) has expanded its partnership with cardiovascular intelligence software company Retia Medical to distribute the Argos Cardiac Output Monitor. This collaboration aims to leverage Medtronic's Acute Care & Monitoring Technologies to enhance care for high-risk surgical and critically ill patients, with an initial focus on expanding into the European market. Medtronic's involvement will help Retia broaden its reach and integrate advanced hemodynamic monitoring into clinical practice.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ): Focused on Cancer and Neuroscience as a Top Dividend Aristocrat Stock to Buy
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) is prioritizing cancer and neuroscience for long-term growth and aims to be the leading cancer company by 2030, following an announcement by its CEO to not enter the obesity drug market. The company has invested heavily in prostate cancer treatments, research into neurodegenerative diseases like dementia, and artificial intelligence to accelerate drug discovery. JNJ is recognized as a top dividend aristocrat stock, though the article suggests other AI stocks might offer higher returns in a shorter timeframe.

feed.title: FS KKR Capital Corp. (FSK) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP has announced a securities fraud class action lawsuit against FS KKR Capital Corp. (FSK). The lawsuit alleges that the company made misleading statements to investors between May 8, 2024, and February 25, 2026, overstating portfolio restructuring, valuations, and its distribution strategy. Shareholders who suffered losses are encouraged to come forward to lead the lawsuit before the July 6, 2026, deadline.

feed.title: Here’s Why Hormel Foods Corporation (HRL) is One of the Best Dividend Aristocrat Stocks to Buy Now
feed.summary: Hormel Foods Corporation (HRL) is highlighted as a top dividend aristocrat stock due to its strong second-quarter results, including organic top-line growth and double-digit adjusted earnings growth. The company reported a 3% increase in net sales to $2.97 billion and reaffirmed its full-year net sales and adjusted diluted EPS guidance. Hormel's strategic divestiture of its whole-bird turkey business signifies a shift towards expanding its value-added protein portfolio.

feed.title: American Express (AXP) Could Be 16% Undervalued As Valuation Views Split
feed.summary: American Express (AXP) is gaining attention after Piper Sandler started coverage of the payments and consumer finance sector, positioning AXP as a key holding. While one narrative suggests the stock is 12.9% overvalued at $299.60, another Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model indicates it could be 16% undervalued, with a fair value of $403.04 compared to its current trading price of $338.25. The conflicting valuations highlight differing assumptions about future growth, margins, and discount rates, prompting investors to scrutinize the data for themselves.

feed.title: Online Spending Rises 5.3% on First Day of Amazon’s (AMZN) Prime Day, Reuters Reports
feed.summary: Online spending in the U.S. for the first day of Amazon's Prime Day event increased by 5.3% to $8.3 billion, surpassing projections and marking the biggest e-commerce day of 2026 so far. Sales were primarily driven by appliances, electronics, home improvement, and everyday essentials. This year's Prime Day is seen as a "litmus test" for consumer spending, with an emphasis on household basics rather than luxury items due to economic pressures.

feed.title: AbbVie Inc. (ABBV) Hits New Milestone with Venetoclax on Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia (CLL) Treatment
feed.summary: AbbVie Inc. (ABBV) achieved a new milestone with its drug venetoclax for chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL) treatment, demonstrated by positive topline Phase 3 data presented at EHA 2026. The results confirm venetoclax's sustained safety and efficacy, as well as improved progression-free survival when combined with obinutuzumab. This clinical success reinforces AbbVie's commitment to delivering innovative medicines and shareholder value, as evidenced by its recent dividend declaration.

feed.title: Realty Income sets Aug. 5 call for Q2 2026 results
feed.summary: Realty Income (NYSE: O) announced it will release its second quarter 2026 operating results after the NYSE closes on August 5, 2026. The company will host an investor conference call at 2:00 p.m. PDT on the same day, with a live listen-only webcast and telephone replay available until August 12, 2026. Realty Income, known as "The Monthly Dividend Company," has a portfolio of over 15,500 properties and has declared 672 consecutive monthly dividends.

feed.title: YieldMax Bitcoin Option Income Strategy ETF announces weekly distribution of $0.1488
feed.summary: The YieldMax Bitcoin Option Income Strategy ETF has declared a weekly distribution of $0.1488 per share. This announcement provides investors with details regarding the fund's income distribution for the upcoming period.

feed.title: Trimble adds AI-driven takeoff and estimating tools for MEP contractors
feed.summary: Trimble has introduced new AI-driven tools for its mechanical, electrical, and plumbing (MEP) estimating software to significantly reduce time spent on pre-takeoff and quantity takeoff stages. These features include automated scale and naming, symbol recognition, and linear conduit auto-routing, which have reportedly cut task times by up to 60%. Additionally, an AI Smart Assistant in Accubid Anywhere allows natural language queries for historical pricing and estimate comparisons, further enhancing efficiency.

feed.title: CoStar Group to Report Financial Results for Second Quarter on July 28, 2026
feed.summary: CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP) will announce its second-quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Tuesday, July 28, 2026. The company will also hold a conference call at 5:00 PM EDT on the same day to discuss the results and future outlook. A live audio webcast will be available on the Investors section of CoStar Group's website.

feed.title: MGM Investor Notice: Hold Shares of MGM Resorts? Investigation into Proposed Offer is Ongoing
feed.summary: Bleichmar Fonti & Auld LLP (BFA Law) is investigating Barry Diller's proposed $48.30 per share offer to acquire the remaining stock of MGM Resorts International. The investigation focuses on potential breaches of fiduciary duty due to Diller's position as an MGM director and his company, People, Inc., being MGM's largest stockholder, creating conflicts of interest. Current MGM shareholders are encouraged to contact BFA Law to understand their rights in this ongoing inquiry.

feed.title: IDEXX Laboratories to Release 2026 Second Quarter Financial Results
feed.summary: IDEXX Laboratories, Inc. (NASDAQ: IDXX) has announced that it will release its 2026 second quarter financial results on Tuesday, August 4, 2026, before market open, followed by an analyst conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET. The company will also host its 2026 Investor Day on Thursday, August 13, 2026, at its Westbrook, Maine headquarters. Both events will have webcast access available on the IDEXX investor relations website.

feed.title: Michael Burry's Short Call Dents Caterpillar's AI-Fueled Rally
feed.summary: Michael Burry, known for his bets against the 2008 housing market, has announced his first short position against industrial heavyweight Caterpillar Inc., causing its stock to slide from a record high. Burry also revealed short positions in several other AI-driven stocks, including Nvidia, Applied Materials, and the iShares Semiconductor ETF (SOXX), believing their recent rallies are unsustainable. He also maintains a bearish stance on Tesla, reiterating his view that its shares are "ridiculously overvalued."

feed.title: Apple Seeks to Buy Chinese-Made Memory Chips With Lobbying Push
feed.summary: Apple Inc. is reportedly in talks to acquire memory chips from two blacklisted Chinese semiconductor manufacturers, ChangXin Memory Technologies Inc. and Yangtze Memory Technologies Co. This move is aimed at mitigating the impact of a global memory shortage, which has led Apple to increase prices across its product range. The discussions are ongoing, with the chips intended for devices sold within China.

feed.title: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) Is Up 6.7% After 21% Revenue Growth on Drug Delivery Demand
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) reported a 21% revenue growth, driven by strong demand for its advanced drug delivery systems. This performance highlights the company's central role in injectable drug therapies and influences its investment outlook. The article also touches upon a recent asset sale to AbbVie, emphasizing how the company navigates shifting market demands and contract manufacturing transitions.

feed.title: Why Dow (DOW) Is Down 9.8% After Recent Underperformance And Earnings Uncertainty - And What's Next
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (DOW) has seen a 9.8% drop recently, underperforming the market and its sector, as investors anticipate its July 23, 2026 earnings report. Despite this, valuation models suggest the company might be undervalued, highlighting the importance of the upcoming earnings call to reconcile perceived value with fundamentals. The company's investment narrative hinges on its ability to improve cash generation through cost cuts and portfolio adjustments, especially after a reported net loss in Q1 2026.

feed.title: Netflix gains over 3% as report refutes NBCUniversal acquisition speculation
feed.summary: Netflix shares rose over 3% after The Wall Street Journal refuted earlier speculation that the streaming giant was planning a bid for NBCUniversal. This news alleviated investor concerns following Netflix's recent loss in a bidding war for Warner Bros. Discovery and its previously struggling stock performance. Despite a temporary lockup period preventing immediate acquisition, some analysts believe the strategic logic for a future deal remains, particularly as Netflix reports its Q2 2026 earnings soon.

feed.title: Investigation launched into potential securities fraud at Wealthfront after stock drop.
feed.summary: Law firm Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP is investigating Wealthfront Corporation for potential securities fraud. This probe follows a significant drop in Wealthfront's stock price—nearly 17%—after the company reported a sharp decline in net deposits for Q3 2026. The firm is inviting affected shareholders to contact them for a potential class action to determine if unlawful business practices occurred.

feed.title: West Pharmaceutical Services stock hits 52-week high at 363.38 USD
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) stock has reached a new 52-week high of $363.38, reflecting a 64.01% increase over the past year. The company, with a market cap of $25.6 billion and 11% revenue growth, has raised its dividend for 33 consecutive years. Recent positive developments include an upgrade to Overweight by Barclays with a $400 price target, an Outperform rating from Wolfe Research, a new CEO appointment, and progress in cyberattack recovery efforts.

feed.title: Why KLA Corporation (KLAC) Stock Is Down Today
feed.summary: Shares of KLA Corporation (KLAC) fell 12.3% today, amidst a broader semiconductor sector sell-off driven by investors taking profits after a record-breaking first half of the year. This downturn follows a previous drop related to SK Hynix slowing its high-bandwidth memory expansion, though that was more a margin story than a demand slump. Despite today's volatility, KLA Corporation has seen significant gains year-to-date, making some analysts view the recent dip as a buying opportunity.

feed.title: Chevron Corporation (CVX) Partners with Microsoft to Power Texas Data Center
feed.summary: Chevron Corporation has partnered with Microsoft to develop Project Kilby, a co-located natural gas-fired power facility in Texas. This facility will provide dedicated electricity to Microsoft's data center campus for 20 years, expanding its capacity by 2 gigawatts and supporting thousands of jobs. Chevron is expected to make a final investment decision on the project by year-end, collaborating with Engine No 1 and GE Vernova.

feed.title: Worthington Steel (NYSE: WS) CFO awarded 8,150 restricted shares vesting in 2029
feed.summary: Worthington Steel's Chief Financial Officer, Timothy A. Adams, was granted 8,150 restricted Common Shares as part of the company's 2023 Long-Term Incentive Plan. These shares will vest on June 26, 2029, which is the third anniversary of the grant date. Following this award, Mr. Adams directly holds a total of 52,248 Common Shares in Worthington Steel.

feed.title: Hagens Berman Investigates Verra Mobility Corporation
feed.summary: Hagens Berman is expanding its investigation into Verra Mobility Corp. (VRRM) following the abrupt resignation of its CEO, David Roberts. This leadership change comes after a securities class action lawsuit was filed due to the unexpected termination of a major contract with Avis Budget Group, which caused a significant loss in shareholder value. The lawsuit alleges that Verra made misleading statements regarding its relationship with Avis, and the firm is investigating whether the CEO's departure is linked to these allegations.

feed.title: (VEMY) and the Role of Price-Sensitive Allocations
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed AI-driven analysis of Virtus Stone Harbor Emerging Markets High Yield Bond Etf (NASDAQ: VEMY), highlighting neutral near and mid-term readings but a positive long-term outlook. It outlines specific institutional trading strategies including long, momentum breakout, and short positions, along with support and resistance levels across different time horizons. The analysis emphasizes risk-reward ratios and multi-timeframe signal analysis to guide potential trading decisions.

feed.title: Keefe Bruyette Cuts PT on Walker & Dunlop (WD) – Here’s Why
feed.summary: Keefe Bruyette has lowered its price target on Walker & Dunlop (WD) to $63 from $67, while maintaining an Outperform rating. This adjustment reflects a slightly more cautious outlook on the commercial real estate market from the firm. Concurrently, Walker & Dunlop successfully arranged $128.23 million in refinancing for a large multifamily portfolio in Eugene, Oregon, highlighting continued strong demand in specific real estate sectors.

feed.title: Xponential Fitness (XPOF) director and 10% owner awarded 15,959 RSUs
feed.summary: Xponential Fitness (XPOF) director and 10% owner Mark Grabowski was granted 15,959 restricted stock units (RSUs) as an equity award for his board service. This grant increases his direct holdings of Class A common stock to 84,046 shares. The RSUs will vest based on his continued service, specifically on the earlier of the first anniversary of the company's 2026 Annual Meeting or the date of the 2027 Annual Meeting.

feed.title: St. Paul Downtown Development Corp. buys U.S. Bank Center after acquiring bank note
feed.summary: The St. Paul Downtown Development Corp., a nonprofit organization, has purchased the U.S. Bank Center in downtown St. Paul. This acquisition was made possible after the organization bought the bank note for the 26-story building from its former lender late last year. The article also provides links to related news concerning other downtown St. Paul properties.

feed.title: Okta, Autodesk, and Dynatrace Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Okta, Autodesk, and Dynatrace saw significant jumps following Guggenheim analyst John DiFucci's upgrade of Salesforce and ServiceNow to "Buy" status. DiFucci's call was based on valuation, asserting that fears of AI disruption had driven software sector valuations too low, and that the "SaaSpocalypse" repricing had overshot. This positive sentiment, coupled with Oracle's bounce due to an AI product and oversold conditions, contributed to a broader recovery in tech stocks.

feed.title: Willis Lease Finance (WLFC) Announces Shareholder Approval of Three-for-One Forward Stock Split
feed.summary: Willis Lease Finance (WLFC) announced that its shareholders and Board of Directors approved a three-for-one forward stock split and a proportionate increase in authorized shares. Shareholders of record as of July 6, 2026, will receive two additional shares for each share held, with trading on a split-adjusted basis expected to begin on July 20, 2026. Executive Chairman Charles F. Willis noted that this approval, along with other proposals, positions the company for growth and shareholder value creation.

feed.title: Why Are CoStar (CSGP) Shares Soaring Today
feed.summary: CoStar Group (CSGP) shares rose after the company announced an investment to acquire a 30% stake in Wikicasa, an Italian real estate marketplace, as part of its international expansion. Analyst Benchmark initiated coverage with a "Buy" rating and a $45 price target, suggesting the stock, despite a 50% year-to-date decline, might be poised for a rebound. This positive news follows a period of volatility and a previous 18.2% drop due to a mixed earnings forecast.

feed.title: Omnicom Group (OMC) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Omnicom Group's shares jumped over 5% after its media group, PHD, reportedly secured Adidas's global media account, valued at more than $500 million. This significant win has driven positive investor sentiment, despite the company's mixed fourth-quarter results four months prior, which showed strong revenue growth but a miss on profitability. Investors appear to be prioritizing the recent client acquisition and demand acceleration.

feed.title: RSU grant and exercise for YD Bio (YDES) director Chang Kochi
feed.summary: YD Bio Ltd director Chang Kochi reported exercising 5,749 Restricted Share Units (RSUs) into ordinary shares and simultaneously receiving a new grant of 5,749 RSUs on June 30, 2026. After these transactions, Kochi directly holds 7,830 ordinary shares. The new RSU grant has a target aggregate fair value of $60,000, vesting in four equal quarterly installments based on a volume-weighted average price calculation.

feed.title: RSU grant and exercise update for YD Bio (YDES) director Lu
feed.summary: YD Bio Ltd. director Lu Shao-Ta reported exercising 5,749 Restricted Share Units (RSUs) into ordinary shares and receiving a new grant of 5,749 RSUs. These transactions update his direct holdings to 7,830 ordinary shares and indirect holdings (through his spouse) to 51,151 ordinary shares, alongside 5,749 outstanding RSUs. The RSUs were granted under the company's Equity Incentive Plan, with an aggregate target grant date fair value of $60,000, vesting quarterly based on a volume-weighted average price calculation.

feed.title: McKesson exec to retire in another C-suite change for pharma giant
feed.summary: McKesson, the Irving-based drug distribution giant, announced the retirement of Thomas Rodgers, its chief strategy and business development officer, roughly a month after the company welcomed a new CFO. This marks another significant change in the C-suite for DFW's largest locally headquartered public company.

feed.title: Director Yang Tseli Lily granted 15,959 Xponential Fitness (XPOF) RSUs for board service
feed.summary: Xponential Fitness director Yang Tseli Lily was granted 15,959 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) for her board service, increasing her direct holdings to 41,793 shares. The RSUs will vest upon continued service, on the earlier of the first anniversary of the 2026 annual meeting or the 2027 annual meeting. This grant is considered a routine equity award aimed at aligning director incentives with shareholder interests.

feed.title: Michael Burry’s Short Call Dents Caterpillar’s AI-Fueled Rally
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. stock saw a decline from its record high after investor Michael Burry, known for his bets against the 2008 housing market, revealed he had shorted the industrial company. This development follows a significant 150% rally in Caterpillar's stock over the past year, largely attributed to its power equipment business's perceived connection to the artificial intelligence infrastructure buildout. Burry's move suggests he believes this AI-fueled growth run for Caterpillar and other AI-driven stocks is nearing its end.

feed.title: Director Rachel H. Lee receives 15,959 RSUs at Xponential Fitness (XPOF)
feed.summary: Xponential Fitness director Rachel H. Lee was granted 15,959 restricted stock units (RSUs) for her board service, increasing her total direct holdings to 35,644 shares. The RSUs, awarded at a price of $0.00 per share, will vest upon continued service, specifically on the earlier of the first anniversary of the 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders or the date of the 2027 Annual Meeting. This transaction was a grant, not a stock purchase or sale.

feed.title: HII Begins Fabrication of Destroyer John F. Lehman (DDG 137)
feed.summary: HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding division has started fabrication of the future USS John F. Lehman (DDG 137), marking the official beginning of construction for the Navy's newest Flight III Arleigh Burke-class destroyer. This milestone is supported by HII's distributed shipbuilding model, which involves partner yards in multiple states producing structural units to expand capacity. The DDG 137 is the seventh Flight III destroyer to be built at Ingalls, featuring advanced radar and combat systems to counter future threats.

feed.title: HII starts building Navy destroyer John F. Lehman DDG 137
feed.summary: HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding division has commenced fabrication of the future USS John F. Lehman (DDG 137), an Arleigh Burke-class Flight III destroyer. This marks the official start of construction, utilizing a distributed shipbuilding model across six partner yards to expand capacity. The DDG 137 is the seventh Flight III destroyer for Ingalls, featuring advanced radar and combat systems, with HII planning to outsource over 2.5 million shipbuilding hours in 2026 to enhance industrial base resiliency.

feed.title: James Uthmeier issues civil subpoena to FICO credit ranking company
feed.summary: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier has launched a civil investigation into Fair Isaac Corp. (FICO), issuing a subpoena for pricing information amid concerns of anti-competitive practices. Uthmeier alleges FICO maintains a monopoly in the credit scoring market, leading to skyrocketing prices and blocking competition, which negatively impacts Floridians' access to credit. FICO has until August 5 to comply with the subpoena, which seeks documents from a federal antitrust case, internal market assessments, license agreements, and pricing histories.
